meaning: n.卷发,卷毛,吱吱响声vt.使卷缩,使卷曲vi.卷曲,炸得吱吱响
examples: They crack and frizzle. They "weep" out additives. They melt into sludge.
Blondarexia means that "Being so addicted to bleaching your hair that it's almost white, flat, monochromatic, and burnt to a frizzle."
She watched the paper curl and frizzle and burn; and presently they were ashes.
